response: Imagine you’re holding a blue British electrical plug with its distinctive shape. You’re about to plug it into one of three different wall sockets: one with round pins, another with flat pins, or the standard three-pin socket. Which socket will safely accept it?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a blue UK plug. Put it into one of these wall sockets: the round-pin socket, the flat-pin socket, or the three-pin socket. Which one?
